title: parosela neglecta
intro: Parosela neglecta is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the parosela plant. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Parosela neglecta include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
